channel.title: Create FortiManager VM :: Field SE Lab Guide
channel.description: RDP to OOB. ​ from Terminal in OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/fortinet ./create-vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fmg v7.6.4.F ./start_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fmg started Make sure FortiManager VM has fully started before continuing. Suggest opening console windows and verifying login prompt showing. Configure FortiManager From the VM’s console on ProxMox Login using admin / “no password”
